Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One record per family from inquiry through the 2-visit postpartum cadence.
  • On-call window (37-42w) with birth kit + home prep + backup plan on one screen.
  • Cash-pay and BCBS/Aetna/Cigna billing lanes tracked side-by-side so nothing gets lost between visits.
